queries.question: Show all essays and poetry entries written by Emily Dickinson.
queries.sql:
SELECT WrittenWorks.Title 
FROM WrittenWorks JOIN Authors ON WrittenWorks.AuthorID = Authors.AuthorID
WHERE (WrittenWorks.Type = 'Essay' OR WrittenWorks.Type = 'Poetry') AND Authors.name = "Emily Dickinson"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?writtenworks a :WrittenWorks .
  ?authors a :Authors .
  ?writtenworks p:hasAuthors ?authors .
  ?writtenworks p:Title ?title .
  ?writtenworks p:Type ?type_w .
  ?writtenworks p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?authors p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Essay" || STR(?type_w2) = "Poetry")) && STR(?name_w) = "Emily Dickinson"))
}
